label: Extra damage
description: An additional damage instance applied alongside the primary damage of a melee hit or projectile impact.

def.label: Damage def
def.description: DamageDef applied as the extra hit.

amount.label: Amount
amount.description: Base damage amount of the extra hit.

armorPenetration.label: Armor penetration
armorPenetration.description: Armor penetration factor of the extra hit (0–1). -1 uses the primary verb's value.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability (0–1) that this extra damage fires on each hit.
